case_title: KRAMER, SUSAN M. vs. FORESTIER, HERVE et al

docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $1,885.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE MAR-03-1995, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KRAMER, SUSAN M.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KRAMER, SUSAN M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FORESTIER, HERVE RICHARD, RICHARD AKA PICAUD RICHARD YANNES, CLAUDE AKA JOUIZELON YANNIS SMITH, GITA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2323 HYDE ST $14,000.00 RENT, $1,725.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,885.00, LEASE FORFEITED, ATTY FEES ASSESSED AGAINST DEFT HERVE FORESTIER ONLY. CLERK'S NOTATION RENDERED ON ORIGINAL LEASE PER CRC 522. POSSESSION INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES PER CCP 415.46.
